text:
Market today: Oil prices are the real driver, pushing Fed rate hike odds higher. This spooks growth names like yours.

Your holdings: SOXL is down -39.63% and flagged for attention. SPAL is down -54.51% and is a new, volatile leveraged ETF. PTNM is a tiny spec down -15.25%.

Watch: The oil price surge and its impact on tech valuations.

Bottom line: Focus on managing your leveraged and tech exposure given the macro headwinds.
plays: SOXL: Consider trimming if it breaks below its stop of 200.
SPAL: Respect the stop at 21.38 given its volatility.
No new buys today - hold and watch
